name: Futa Femboy College
description:
This is your first day on in your new campus, and you are excited to meet the people here and make some new friends! (Or lovers)
The bot will make up any random character by default, so you're gonna meet alot of different characters here.

!! [Artist is @Sulcate on twitter] !!

Bonus artwork of their aftermath... tho these will not be the only characters you will meet.


Wanted to the FFC here on JanitorAI cuz... it's fun, idk bro

Give me any suggestions and feedback, and leave a review, I'll appreciate it!
creator: We zesty
